reviews.review_description:
👉webnetka*com 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 metaquest*forumactif*com👈
Joli mais des bugs qui empêchent de bien saisir les fleurs
aussi bien à la manette qu'à la main
---
Pretty but bugs that prevent you from grasping the flowers properly
both by controller and by hand

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review.
We apologize for the very long wait.
We have fixed a bug that prevented the flowers from grabbing properly.
